summary: Completed testing of new landing page implementation. All features working correctly - hero section, features grid, how-it-works section, CTA, and navigation between landing and builder pages.
passed_tests: Landing page loads at '/' with hero section
Hero section displays 'Build Neural Networks Visually' title
Animated neural network background canvas renders correctly
Features section with 5 feature cards visible
How-it-works section with 3 steps (Design, Train, Export) visible
CTA section with 'Ready to build?' heading visible
data-testid='learn-more-btn' present and scrolls to features section
Builder page loads correctly at '/builder' with layer palette and header
NeuralFlows logo in builder header links back to landing page ('/')
context_for_next_testing_agent: Landing page implementation complete and working. All navigation flows between landing page and builder page work correctly. All required data-testid attributes are present.
